allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\);const mongoose=require\('mongoose'\);const User=require\('./models/User'\);const Escrow=require\('./models/Escrow'\);mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async\(\)=>{const u=await User.deleteMany\({email:/^testmodal_/}\);const e=await Escrow.deleteMany\({serviceName:'Test Modal Job'}\);console.log\('cleaned',u.deletedCount,'users',e.deletedCount,'escrows'\);await mongoose.disconnect\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\);const mongoose=require\('mongoose'\);const User=require\('./models/User'\);const Escrow=require\('./models/Escrow'\);mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async\(\)=>{const u=await User.deleteMany\({email:/^testvis_/}\);const e=await Escrow.deleteMany\({serviceName:'Visual Test Contract'}\);console.log\('cleaned',u.deletedCount,'users',e.deletedCount,'escrows'\);await mongoose.disconnect\(\)}\);")
